integrity.method: All modules registered with Version 2.0, Status LOCKED and declared Integrity Hash values CM-XX-LOCKED-v2.0.

dependencies.method: Declared module dependencies were transcribed into knowledge_graph/knowledge_graph.json relationships.

cross_module_consistency.method: All declared module references resolve to registered canonical modules or declared module groups 09-18_Country_Chapters.

traceability.method: Every graph entity includes canonical source path and integrity hash.

lost_elements.method: No missing canonical module IDs detected in canonical_index.json after 01-23 registration.

technical_notes: Verification was performed through GitHub Connector operations and previously materialized canonical files; no local repository clone or full filesystem scan was available in this environment.
Knowledge Graph is an initial canonical graph export, not yet a Builder runtime implementation.
No Builder, Publishing Pipeline or Master Edition generation was performed in this sprint.
